title: A Light in the Forest
content: While camping with friends, Noah noticed a bright light moving between the trees late at night. The others saw it too, and they quietly wondered who could be walking through the forest. The light disappeared and returned several times. The next morning, they followed the direction where they had seen it. They discovered a small ranger station hidden among the trees. A park ranger explained that he checked the area every evening with a flashlight to make sure campers were safe. The mysterious light suddenly made perfect sense.
